meta.description: Display comprehensive episode production status and project overview

step.name: load_episode_config
step.action: Load the episode-config.yaml for the current episode from episodes/{episode_id}/episode-config.yaml. Extract the production_state block which contains boolean flags for each workflow completion checkpoint. Extract the episode status field (not-started, planning, pre-production, in-production, post-production, complete).
step.output: Episode configuration and production state loaded

step.name: load_asset_inventory
step.action: Scan the episode's assets directory (episodes/{episode_id}/assets/) to count generated assets. Count: video clips generated vs total scenes in SSD, narration files generated vs scenes requiring narration, screen recordings generated vs screen-recording type scenes. Check the SSD for total scene count.

step.name: load_cost_summary
step.action: Load the cost estimate from _cost/estimates/{episode_id}-estimate.yaml and actuals from _cost/actuals/{episode_id}-actuals.yaml. Calculate current spend, estimated total, and percentage used. If files do not exist, note that cost data is not yet available.

step.name: display_episode_status
step.action: Display a comprehensive status report for the current episode. Include: Episode header (ID, title), Overall status (derived from production_state), Progress checklist with status icons for each production step (script finalized, characters created, style guide created, SSD created and validated, cost approved, assets generated with count, asset QA passed, composition assembled, preview approved, final rendered, exports complete, final QA passed), Asset summary (scenes generated/total, narrations generated/total), and Cost summary (spent/estimated with percentage). Use status icons: completed checkmark for true, in-progress indicator for the current step, empty indicator for false.
step.output: Formatted episode status displayed to user

step.name: display_project_overview
step.action: If project-config.yaml exists and contains multiple episodes, display a project-level overview. List all registered episodes with: episode_id, title, status, and cost (actual or estimated). Show project budget: total spent across all episodes, total budget, utilization percentage. This gives the user a bird's eye view of the entire series.

quality-gates.gate: Episode production state loaded from episode-config.yaml
Asset inventory counted accurately against SSD
Cost summary calculated from estimate and actuals
Status report displayed with clear progress indicators
Project overview displayed if multi-episode project exists
